focus_intent: ITERATION 10 (sim-only): BIDIRECTIONAL scope rule established. Quantum kernel HELPS for cluster-similar docs (classical > 0.4 → 25-34pp real-QPU advantage) but HURTS for already-distinct docs (classical < 0.3 → classical wins by 15-60pp). Verified across 3 non-QBC triads (wide-unrelated / Snap-RE / medium-doctrine). Fleet action items doc updated with 3-phase production workflow including sim-only gate before real-QPU. Zero cloud burn this iteration. Investigation at definitive close after 10 iterations.
